sub_exhibits.name: Hyatt Hotels Corporation Audited Consolidated Financial Statements (FY2022-2024)
includes: Independent Auditor's Report — Deloitte & Touche LLP (pp.91-93)

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Approximately 77 pages. Includes exhibits to the FA (Exhibit B-1 with Guarantor Monetary Threshold, Exhibit C with Right of First Offer, Exhibit E with IT Project Management SOW, Exhibit F with Management Company Rider).

exhibits.name: Design and Construction Standards
exhibits.notes: Standards for constructing/renovating Brand Hotels. Referenced throughout Items 1, 7, 8, 11.

exhibits.name: State Administrators/Agents for Service of Process
System Standards Table of Contents
exhibits.notes: Table of contents for the 3,641-page System Standards manual. Standards themselves are confidential and not included in FDD.

exhibits.name: List of Franchisees
exhibits.notes: 4 franchised Brand Hotels as of December 31, 2024 with addresses and phone numbers.

exhibits.name: List of Franchisees Who Left the System
exhibits.notes: No franchisees had outlets terminated, canceled, transferred, or not renewed during most recent fiscal year.

exhibits.name: Hosting Services Agreement
exhibits.notes: PMS hosting services agreement. Mandatory — must sign and use franchisor-hosted Opera PMS.

exhibits.name: Comfort Letter
exhibits.notes: Required from each lender, ground lessor, and fee simple owner. Party agrees to assume FA obligations upon acquisition.

exhibits.name: Central Hotel Services by Hyatt Master Agreement
exhibits.notes: Governs Non-Mandatory System Services (field marketing, revenue management, central sales, GPGS, digital ancillary). Includes program schedules.

exhibits.name: State-Specific Additional Disclosures and Riders
states_covered: Multi-state (CA, HI, IL, IN, MD, MI, MN, NY, ND, RI, SD, VA, WA, WI)
